functions.test_requirement: Cover POST /subscriptions/cancel with executed Jest evidence for endpoint response mapping, cancellation with and without a reason, and the main failure branches for missing active subscriptions and already-scheduled cancellations.

preconditions: Authenticated user "client-1" has an active subscription "sub-1"
returns: returns success response with cancelled subscription summary
logs: Cancel Subscription Endpoint Successful: user="client-1" subscription="sub-1"

preconditions: Subscription is not already scheduled for cancellation
returns: returns cancelled subscription with cancelReason = "Budget changed"

preconditions: Subscription is not already scheduled for cancellation
returns: returns cancelled subscription with cancelReason = null

exceptions: NotFoundException: No active subscription found. You are currently on the free plan.
logs: Cancel Subscription Failed: No active subscription found. You are currently on the free plan.

preconditions: Subscription is already scheduled for cancellation
exceptions: ConflictException: Your subscription is already scheduled for cancellation at the end of the current billing period.
logs: Cancel Subscription Failed: Your subscription is already scheduled for cancellation at the end of the current billing period.

preconditions: Authenticated user "client-1" has no active subscription
exceptions: NotFoundException: No active subscription found. You are currently on the free plan.
logs: Cancel Subscription Endpoint Failed: No active subscription found. You are currently on the free plan.
